title: Pulimukham Devi Temple
tagline: Pulimukham Devi Temple — spiritual town of Kerala

overview.short: Pulimukam Temple is a Hindu temple located in Thazhava neighbourhood in the Kollam district of Kerala, India.
overview.description: Pulimukam Temple is a Hindu temple located in Thazhava neighbourhood in the Kollam district of Kerala, India. Bhadra Bhagavathi is the presiding deity of the temple. The temple is situated at about 5 km north of Karunagappally and is reachable by National Highway 47.

routes.byAir: Fly to nearest airport + road transfer
Fly to nearest airport + road transfer

howToReach.roadNote: Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

topPlaces.name: Thazhava
topPlaces.description: Thazhava is a village in Karunagappally taluk, Kollam district in the state of Kerala, India.

topPlaces.name: Manappally
topPlaces.description: Manppally is a small village located near Thazhava, Kollam district, Kerala, India.

topPlaces.name: Vallikunnam
topPlaces.description: Vallikunnam is a village in Mavelikara taluk of Alappuzha district in the Indian state of Kerala.

topPlaces.name: Changankulangara Mahadeva Temple
topPlaces.description: Mahadeva Temple is a Shiva temple at Changankulangara in Kollam in the state of Kerala in India. It is one of the 108 Shiva temples in India.

topPlaces.name: Padanayarkulangara Mahadeva Temple
topPlaces.description: Padanayarkulangara Mahadeva Temple (Malayalam: പടനായർകുളങ്ങര മഹാദേവക്ഷേത്രം) is an ancient Hindu temple dedicated to Lord Shiva. It is situated on the banks of the Pallikkal River at Karunagappally town of Kollam District in the Indian state of Kerala state.

topPlaces.name: Alumpeedika
topPlaces.description: Alumpeedika is a small village/hamlet of Oachira in the Kollam district of Kerala, India. It comes under Clappana Panchayath and belongs to South Kerala division.

topPlaces.name: Kannetty
topPlaces.description: Kannetty is a village situated on the outskirts of Karunagappally, Kollam district, Kerala, India. Kannetty is famous for the Vallam kalis conducted in the backwater of the same name.

topPlaces.name: Karunagappalli
topPlaces.description: Karunagappally is a municipality in the Kollam district of Kerala, India. It is 24 km north of Kollam and 60 km (37 mi) south of Alappuzha.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Pulimukham Devi Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Pulimukham Devi Temple is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Pulimukham Devi Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Thiruvananthapuram International Airport (79 km) and the nearest railway station is Thiruvananthapuram Central (80 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Pulimukham Devi Temple?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Pulimukham Devi Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Pulimukham Devi Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Pulimukham Devi Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Pulimukham Devi Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Thazhava, Manappally, Vallikunnam, Changankulangara Mahadeva Temple, Padanayarkulangara Mahadeva Temple.
